creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

On Wed, 21 Jul 1999, Dmitry S. Sivachenko wrote:

> >Synopsis:       devel/glib12 build fails

> >Environment:
> 
> FreeBSD-2.2.8-RELEASE, 227upgrade-1998.12.17, Current ports tree
> (cvsupped today).

> >Description:
> 
> When I am trying to build glib12 port, it fails on build stage with
> 'cannot open Makefile' message. Regardless it has GNU configure, there
> is no messages during configure stage. It looks like USE_LIBTOOL is
> not properly handled (moreover, there were no messages about 'checking
> dependencies...')

The problem is, as you surmise, w/ the USE_LIBTOOL option.  I have a
machine that is still running 2.2.8 and I couldn't get this to work either
after trying a few things.  Not sure what you can do to get around this -
maybe someone else has ideas.  Note also that the ports are not being
supported for 2.2.8 anymore, just the current -STABLE branch (3.2).  

Brett
